zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ingram Bruyn於1353年12月6日出生在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德時，他的父親Sir William Bruyn38歲，母親Alice Le Lacer37歲。他於大約1382年與Elizabeth de la Pole在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年8月12日在英國艾可素斯 奧肯登享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可素斯 奧肯登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ingram Bruyn于1353年12月6日出生在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德时，他的父亲Sir William Bruyn38岁，母亲Alice Le Lacer37岁。他于大约1382年与Elizabeth de la Pole在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年8月12日在英国艾可素斯 奧肯登享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可素斯 奧肯登。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: Ingram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a medieval given name. This was originally a contracted form of the Norman name Engelram, composed of the ethnic name Engel ‘Angle’ (or Ing, name of the Old Norse fertility god) + hramn ‘raven’. As late as the 17th century Engelram and Ingram were still in occasional use as given names in the north of England.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ingram Bruyn was born on 6 December 1353, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir William Bruyn, was 38 and his mother, Alice Le Lacer, was 37. He married Elizabeth de la Pole about 1382, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 August 1400, in South Ockendon, Essex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in South Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ingram Bruyn est né le 6 décembre 1353, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Bruyn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alice Le Lacer, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de la Pole environ 1382, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1400, à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ingram Bruyn am 6. Dezember 1353 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Bruyn 38 und seine Mutter Alice Le Lacer 37. Er hat um 1382 in England Elizabeth de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1400 im Alter von 46 Jahren in South Ockendon, Essex, England und wurde in South Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ingram Bruyn è nato il il 6 dicembre 1353 nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Bruyn, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Alice Le Lacer, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de la Pole circa 1382, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1400, nel South Ockendon, Essex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a South Ockendon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ingram Bruynが1353年12月6日にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir William Bruynは38歳，母Alice Le Lacerは37歳であった。約1382年にイギリスでElizabeth de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年8月12日にイギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ingram Bruyn(이)가 1353년 12월 6일 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Bruyn(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Le Lacer(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1382년 영국에서 Elizabeth de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 8월 12일 영국 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ingram Bruyn nasceu em 6 de dezembro de 1353, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Bruyn, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alice Le Lacer, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de la Pole aproximadamente 1382, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1400, em South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ingram Bruyn родился 6 декабря 1353 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Bruyn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Le Lacer, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de la Pole около 1382 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1400 г. в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
